title: Mirror status is aggregate of status from multiple item - Mirror Automation based on ALL mirror status being something
excerpt: I have 2 boards. The 2nd board has a mirror status that could have multiple items from board 1 linked to it. The Mirror Status on board 2 reflects the aggregate status of those selected items. would be great to have a wa…

posts.author: JVH (Jonathan Van Horn)
posts.cookedHtml: I have 2 boards. The 2nd board has a mirror status that could have multiple items from board 1 linked to it. The Mirror Status on board 2 reflects the aggregate status of those selected items. would be great to have a way in automations to distinguish when ALL mirror status are something, change the Board 2 Status to something. Right now the if mirror status changes to something automation triggers even if just 1 of the items status changes, not all of them. Would even be nice to specific if a specific # or % of a mirror status is something, then change the status

posts.author: highfive331 (Emily Travis)
posts.cookedHtml: My team has the same issue! We’d like to create an automation that is based on the percentage status of the mirror status column. We have many products in a single order that can have different statuses (ready, paused, waiting for something), but we want to be able to trigger an overall order status change when all the pieces are completed. Currently we have to manually change the order status when we visually check to see that the pieces are ready.

posts.author: Avery (Avery Romine)
posts.cookedHtml: Has there been any word on this? My company would love to have this feature as this would cut down on need to do manual work.

posts.author: rodneyz (Rodney)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JVH , it looks like you are having trouble with using mirror column. There’s a lot of monday users that benefit from having the same item love on multiple boards thereby syncing the columns they want. Search and install this app from the marketplace and let me know how it goes Same Item Multiple Boards by Formula Lookout

or use this link instead monday.com: Apps Marketplace

@highfive331 @Avery

posts.author: hellotimi (David Kalu (Formula Pro - Use formula column results in automations!))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JVH ,

Regarding your question about mirror automations based on all mirror status being something.

We’ve just published a detailed walkthrough in the community that directly addresses this challenge. It shows you how to trigger mirror automations based on all mirror statuses being something.

You might find it really helpful: /#/t/120422

Hope this helps you out!
